name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.6 Quotient Rollout-Corrected Flow Map v1
purpose: Learn finite translation-quotient maps Delta(x_s,s,u), including one stop-gradient rollout correction, on the fixed D0.4 64-source single-endpoint panel. This replaces neither D0.5 history nor any tensor-conditioned runtime.

parent_evidence.gate_p5_d0_5_endpoint_bridge_metric_v1: frozen failed endpoint-residual bridge; retained unchanged

model.time_injection: Fourier embedding followed by FiLM in every message block

triple_time_sampling.distribution: sort three independent Uniform[0,1] values per fixed source per optimizer step

training.loss: L_on + L_corr with unit coefficients; rollout state is stop-gradient

evaluation.flow_map_mse: mean over the 32 adjacent analytic grid maps x_tk -> x_tk+1
evaluation.teacher_forced_metric: mean over all 33 analytic states mapped directly to t=1, after independent graphwise translation alignment

decision_rule: Stop after this run. If all criteria pass, only a separately versioned unseen-source flow-map test may be proposed. If any criterion fails, report whether on-path map fitting, rollout correction, or free-running composition failed; do not tune capacity, loss coefficients, schedules, or steps. Do not delete D0.5 code or start P5-D1, harmonic, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT work.
